creator: jakub_lach@mailplus.pl
text:
(In reply to Niclas Zeising from comment #26)

I did not need linuxkpi to run drm-legacy-kmod earlier, so I didn't even had it as a module, and there were no related errors at that time.

From what I have in stripped kernel or autoloaded in modules, it looks to me like linuxkpi needs - usb, firmware, debugfs, pseudofs, procfs, fdescfs.

It is nice that I get direct rendering with fresher driver, even not knowing why drm-legacy-kmod was working before and why it has stopped :)
